creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
- LONG overdue update of Biopython (biology/py-biopython) to version 1.00a1
- Port now optionally includes the Biopython-CORBA extension package
  (controlled via WITH_CORBA).  If WITH_CORBA is defined, the user can
  control which ORB support is installed for via the CORBA_ORB variable.
  This is documented in the port's Makefile, and the user is alerted to this
  via an install-time message during interactive installs.
- PREFIX-clean!  Yay!
- Added files:  files/corba.msg;  files/extra-patch-build_helper.py
- Tested only using Python 2.1 on 5.0-CURRENT
